extName.description: Extension name displayed in the browser toolbar

extDescription.message: Detects torrent files and magnet links, sending them to Boba Project's qBitTorrent dashboard
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in the Chrome Web Store and extension management page

cmdSendToBoba.message: Send current page torrents to Boba
cmdSendToBoba.description: Keyboard shortcut description for sending torrents

cmdScanPage.description: Keyboard shortcut description for scanning the page

cmdOpenDashboard.description: Keyboard shortcut description for opening the dashboard

noTorrentsDetected.message: No torrents detected on this page
noTorrentsDetected.description: Message shown when no torrents are found

sending.description: Status text shown while sending torrents

connectionOnline.description: Status indicating server connection is active

connectionOffline.description: Status indicating server connection is lost

notConfigured.description: Status when no server is set up

serverSectionTitle.description: Title of the server configuration section

generalSectionTitle.description: Title of the general settings section

advancedSectionTitle.description: Title of the advanced settings section

addServer.description: Button to add a new server

contextMenuSend.description: Context menu item to send a torrent

contextMenuScan.description: Context menu item to scan the page

contextMenuDashboard.description: Context menu item to open dashboard
